attempt: Carry forward the Ticket 29 trichotomy result while preserving the proof boundary: finite stress has not produced a proof or certified counterexample.

source_bounded_result_summary.direct_counterexample_route: No certified largest twin-prime pair was produced.
source_bounded_result_summary.no_counterexample_route: Infinitude still requires an exact-gap-2 lower bound on arbitrarily large scales.

obstruction: Finite exact-gap persistence does not prove infinitely many exact gap-2 pairs.
candidate_theorem: A deletion-sensitive exact-gap-2 lower-bound functional remains positive on unbounded intervals.
next_experiment: Search deletion-sensitive exact-gap functionals that cannot be satisfied by bounded-gap-only evidence.
claim_boundary: No Twin Prime proof and no certified largest twin-prime pair.
